# ParagonNodeInfo.Icon property

The atlas (TextureAtlas) containing the [`HIcon`](../ParagonNodeDefinition/HIcon.md) frame, when the node authors one (most nodes leave `HIcon = 0` and rely on [`IconMask`](./IconMask.md)). Resolve the per-frame UVs via [`TryResolveFrame`](../Catalog/TryResolveFrame.md) against the raw handle.

```csharp
public AssetRef? Icon { get; set; }
```
